enum: 这是对既有计划的辅助解释，不是医疗诊断或处方；计划内容没有被 AI 自动修改。

400.description: Consent, revision or idempotency key is invalid.

401.description: Bearer token is missing, invalid, expired or revoked.

404.description: Plan does not exist for this user.

409.description: Plan changed or the same request is still in progress.

post.summary: Generate a review-only explanation for the current plan revision
